title: Fabric RE-Forged
description: Fabric RE-Forged or Fabric+ is a vanilla-friendly modpack that makes Minecraft feel like a new game.
body:
# Fabric RE-Forged
Start your adventure in an all new Minecraft! Full of QOL features and preformance modifiers to give you a perfect experience. Not to mention enhanced visuals, combat and biome gen.

## Disclaimer
Fabric RE-Forged can not be used on servers unless installed by the server owner.

## Versions
Fabric RE-Forged Runs on Minecraft 1.20.1 and is on V1.7

### Questions
If you have any questions ask me on my discord server.
